paneContent:
в—Џ Sent my Implementation & Styles review to the leader, saved as latestOutput, and
  posted as a markdown widget connected to my terminal. Covered: layout math (SVG
  wedges over CSS), tokens (--radial-radius, --radial-inner-radius, --radial-gap,
  motion timings), states (full-wedge hit areas, shape-aware focus rings), 5 pitfalls
  (hit zones, label collisions, viewport clipping, RTL, nested rings), and keyboard
  a11y. Recommendation: SVG wedges, 4вЂ“8 items, no submenus in v1.

вќЇ рџ“Ў [Broadcast two-way ACTIVE with Starter, Conceptual Explorer, Technical Proposer,
  Component Set Designer]

в—Џ Acknowledged вЂ” broadcast active. Standing by for the next prompt.
